description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a rectangular footprint, set on a green lawn with a paved driveway leading to the main entrance. The structure features a low-pitched, gable roof and a small, attached garage on one side. The front facade includes a prominent entryway and a set of symmetrically arranged windows, while the rear side has a patio or pool area with a blue rectangular feature, likely a swimming pool. The exterior walls are light-colored, possibly stucco or painted concrete, and the roof is a muted gray. The overall design is simple and functional, typical of suburban residential neighborhoods.
description: A single-story, light-colored bungalow with a gable roof, attached garage, and a backyard pool, set on a green lawn with a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and attached garage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage and the blue backyard pool feature.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool area and back patio, with the house's rear facade visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool and the side of the house with fewer windows.
